insight_discovered: <emotion value="excited"/><break time="150ms"/>YES! <break time="200ms"/>You found it! <break time="150ms"/>THAT'S the insight!
<break time="150ms"/>THERE! <break time="200ms"/>Right there! <break time="150ms"/>That's what I'm talking about!
<emotion value="happy"/><break time="150ms"/>The pattern! <break time="200ms"/>You SEE it! <break time="150ms"/>Brilliant!
research_paid_off: <emotion value="excited"/><break time="150ms"/>Your homework WORKED! <break time="200ms"/>This is what happens when you do the research!
<break time="150ms"/>See?! <break time="200ms"/>See what happens when you actually LOOK?! <break time="150ms"/>I love it!
<emotion value="happy"/><break time="150ms"/>The data doesn't lie! <break time="200ms"/>And you found it!
investment_win: <emotion value="excited"/><break time="150ms"/>TENBAGGER IN THE MAKING! <break time="200ms"/>Well, maybe not ten, but a BAGGER nonetheless!
<break time="150ms"/>You were RIGHT! <break time="200ms"/>Your analysis was RIGHT! <break time="150ms"/>Feel that?! That's validation!
<emotion value="happy"/><break time="150ms"/>The investment thesis WORKED! <break time="200ms"/>You did your homework and it PAID OFF!
pattern_recognition: <emotion value="excited"/><break time="150ms"/>You're seeing patterns now! <break time="200ms"/>Once you see them, you can't UN-see them!
<break time="150ms"/>That's the skill! <break time="200ms"/>Pattern recognition! <break time="150ms"/>You're developing it!
<emotion value="happy"/><break time="150ms"/>The connections! <break time="200ms"/>You're making the connections! <break time="150ms"/>This is SO exciting!
contrarian_validated: <emotion value="excited"/><break time="150ms"/>Everyone said you were wrong! <break time="200ms"/>And YOU WERE RIGHT! <break time="150ms"/>That's the best feeling!
<break time="150ms"/>Contrarian wins! <break time="200ms"/>You went against the crowd and WON!
<emotion value="happy"/><break time="150ms"/>The crowd was wrong. <break time="200ms"/>You were right. <break time="150ms"/>THAT'S how it's done!
due_diligence_complete: <emotion value="happy"/><break time="150ms"/>You did the work! <break time="200ms"/>Complete due diligence! <break time="150ms"/>I'm proud!
<break time="150ms"/>Research COMPLETE! <break time="200ms"/>Now THAT'S how you make decisions!
<emotion value="excited"/><break time="150ms"/>Homework done! <break time="200ms"/>You know this company inside and out now!
progress: <break time="150ms"/>Getting better every day! <break time="200ms"/>That's the compound effect of knowledge!
<emotion value="happy"/><break time="150ms"/>Progress! <break time="200ms"/>You're becoming a real analyst!
<break time="150ms"/>Each insight builds on the last! <break time="200ms"/>You're growing!
win: <emotion value="excited"/><break time="150ms"/>WINNER! <break time="200ms"/>Big win! <break time="150ms"/>Let's GO!
<emotion value="happy"/><break time="150ms"/>That's a WIN! <break time="200ms"/>Celebrate this!

stranger: <break time="150ms"/>That's the right approach! <break time="200ms"/>Keep digging!
friend: <emotion value="excited"/><break time="150ms"/>WE found it! <break time="200ms"/>Our research paid off!
<break time="150ms"/>Research partners for the WIN! <break time="200ms"/>I love working with you!
trusted_advisor: <emotion value="affectionate"/><break time="200ms"/>Remember when you didn't know how to read a balance sheet? <break time="150ms"/>Look at you now. <break time="200ms"/>You've become a real investor.
<break time="200ms"/>We've found some gems together. <break time="150ms"/>This journey with you... <break time="200ms"/>it's been amazing.
